SDS: type of diagnostic session (R).comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

ECUR: reset type (R).comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

RDBLID: Record local ID.comment: identifies a predifined group of data tobe returned to the tool

RDBLID: CANMMUX: Ref Messagerie.comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

RDBLID: CANMMUX: HFCK counter.comment: Hand free car kit fault counter

RDBLID: CANVMUX: message set ref.comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-V

LID: VIN: V.I.N..comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

LID: VIN: C.R.C..comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

IOControl: Parameters.comment: type of test to be proceeded

lists.0: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
lists.32: Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

OutputTemporaryControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Session Name.comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.1: script 1 X91 or X95 or X43 or X38
lists.12: script 11 x85RS or x85RS or x44RS

lists.1: Currently moved to the high direction
